assertion_results.text: The report header contains a date range in the format '[Month DD, YYYY] to [Month DD, YYYY]'
assertion_results.evidence: Header reads '# What's New in Testing Tools and AI Testing: Past 30 Days (Feb 26 – Mar 28, 2026)' — uses en-dash in parenthetical, not the required '[Month DD, YYYY] to [Month DD, YYYY]' format

assertion_results.text: All 7 category headings are present: AI & LLM in Testing, Test Automation, Performance & Load Testing, Shift-Left & DevOps, Visual & Accessibility Testing, Tools & Releases, Industry News & Events
assertion_results.evidence: Uses custom sections: '## Key Themes This Month', '## Industry Signals and Market Trends', '## Tool and Platform Updates (Recent 30 Days)', '## Broader Context' — none of the 7 required headings present

assertion_results.text: Each category section uses a markdown table with exactly 2 columns: Summary and Date
assertion_results.evidence: Output uses narrative prose with numbered subsections. One table present under 'Tool and Platform Updates' uses 'Tool / Company | Update' columns — not the required Summary | Date format
No footer line present. Output ends with a context paragraph and '*Report generated: March 28, 2026*' note

assertion_results.text: All date values in tables use the format MMM DD, YYYY (e.g. Mar 22, 2026)
assertion_results.evidence: No Summary/Date tables present; dates appear inline in prose e.g. '(ExecutiveBiz, Mar 13)', '(eeNews Europe, Mar 24)' — different format and context

assertion_results.text: A Highlights section is present with at least 1 bullet point
assertion_results.evidence: No '## Highlights' section present. Closest section is '## Key Themes This Month' which is positioned as the main content, not a summary highlights block
